title: amyema lutea
intro: Amyema lutea, also known as green bird lime, is a parasitic plant species in the family Loranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amyema lutea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tea, infusion, and tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
